tweet.text: Watching that was frustrating though, I’ll just leave it at that… Im sorry #Bengals fans it’s my fault I should of told yal the real story. Maybe I’ll put it in a book or something.

@JJWatt @_TJWatt Rules are Rules 🤷🏾‍♂️. First link ask for Mr. Rich he was with me on test drive Or 2nd link I just walked lot haven’t drove it yet. Went with used car so you can save the new new for big bro 🤣. Here’s link to make it easier. #100 https://t.co/mQhuCs3vOu
https://t.co/mSnQJb8a49

@JJWatt @_TJWatt Rules are Rules 🤷🏾‍♂️. First link ask for Mr. Rich he was with me on test drive Or 2nd link I just walked lot haven’t drove it yet. Went with used car so you can save the new new for big bro 🤣. Here’s link to make it easier. #100 https://t.co/mQhuCs3vOu
https://t.co/mSnQJb8a49

Alright after further review my sources have told me that it’s already being or been said so no need to today. Stay tuned if I write the book tho I’ll give it 2 sentences. But just know I’m keeping it 4 more than 96 in it. ;)

I reviewed the post game interviews of the players/playmakers and I am encouraged. As small business owner on the river it not only impacts us emotionally but financially. Everyone wins when Bengals or Reds win!
